name: Spicy Chinese Peanut Butter Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the hot water and smooth peanut butter until well combined.
2. Add the soy sauce and stir to incorporate.
3. Stir in the lemon juice, Cayenne pepper, and Tabasco sauce (if using).
4. Gradually whisk in the brown sugar or honey and sherry until all ingredients are fully blended.
5. Serve over Chinese pork dumplings or pasta.
